scripts.build: echo 'Use EAS Build for production builds'
scripts.build:apk: export $(cat .env | grep -v '#' | xargs) && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && cp app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk ~/Desktop/funberry.apk && echo '✅ APK copied to Desktop!'
scripts.build:apk:debug: export $(cat .env | grep -v '#' | xargs) && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && cp app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk ~/Desktop/funberry-debug.apk && echo '✅ Debug APK copied to Desktop!'
